CEN Response Viewer

Response 218573696

We've Been Collaborating on the Canopy for Kids Project Bringing Shade Trees

Community Engagement (CE) - partner is involved in research, capstone, or collaborative project work.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

We've been collaborating on the Canopy for Kids project bringing shade trees to Phoenix schools. The program launch in 2026 and will continue for 4 years.

Question

Activity Start Date / End Date

Start Date

2025-07-01 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

End Date

2026-06-30 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

Question

Public Service or Community Engagement

Community Engagement (CE) - partner is involved in research, capstone, or collaborative project work.
